First and second place awards at A Awards Junior went to our students!

Our students from the Advertising Department Advertising Workshop won

first

and second place

awards

in the

A Awards Junior

competition organized by the

Outdoor Advertisers Foundation (ARVAK)

and open to all communication faculties.

With Başaran Türkmen, Birol Şahin, Tolga Demirci, Emine Nura Şahin and Nazlıhan Abdikoğlu, who formed the group

Giderayak

, which won the A Awards Junior championship,

We congratulate Filiz Kondakçı, Sultan Kenar and Artun Er, who formed the group called

Likha

, which came in second in the A Awards Junior, on their success and congratulate the advertising department teachers who trained them.

About the competition:

This year, the participants of the

A Awards Junior

competition, organized by the Outdoor Advertising Foundation to encourage young talents studying at university communication faculties to use the highly effective outdoor medium effectively and creatively, competed for the brief from the Lenova brand.
